name: REDCLIFF WRANGLERS
description:
I liek redcliff wranglers... But i also liek tundras..... WHAT ZABOUT MIX EM UP!?

Redcliff wranglers but snow au! Be whatever you want! An sleddog stuff deliverer... An medic... Whatever you want! Also in this au the red of the redcliff wranglers still vivid! But more adapted to the cold! Btw this passed on 1920s years!! :D

Enjoy yourself on this au!! ^^ if you have any headcanons, put into the chat's memory!!
creator: Guaranazin
